findings.title: Hardcoded Secrets in Source Code
findings.recommendation: Move Firebase API keys to environment variables or use flutter_dotenv. Consider Firebase App Check to restrict API key misuse.

findings.title: Missing HTTP Security Headers in Web Build
findings.actual: All headers present: X-Frame-Options, X-Content-Type-Options, Content-Security-Policy, Referrer-Policy, Permissions-Policy, Strict-Transport-Security [POST-FIX]
findings.recommendation: Add the following headers to firebase.json hosting headers config: X-Frame-Options, X-Content-Type-Options, Content-Security-Policy, Referrer-Policy, Permissions-Policy, Strict-Transport-Security

findings.title: Missing Auth Guards on Firestore Write Operations
findings.expected: All Firestore writes gated by Firebase Auth check
findings.actual: 2 file(s) perform Firestore writes without visible auth guard
findings.recommendation: Ensure every Firestore write checks FirebaseAuth.instance.currentUser != null before executing. Also enforce server-side rules in Firestore security rules.

details.issue: Firestore write operations found without visible auth guard in same file
Firestore write operations found without visible auth guard in same file

findings.title: Missing Input Validation on User-Facing Text Fields
findings.expected: All text inputs have validator, maxLength, or inputFormatters

findings.title: Dart Static Analyzer Issues
findings.actual: dart not found in PATH — skipped
findings.recommendation: Install Flutter/Dart SDK and ensure it is in PATH.

findings.title: Insecure Firebase Security Rules
findings.expected: Restrictive Firebase security rules (no open access)
findings.actual: Security rules file not found: firestore.rules; Security rules file not found: storage.rules
findings.recommendation: Replace `allow read, write: if true` with proper auth checks: `allow read, write: if request.auth != null && request.auth.uid == resource.data.uid`

details.issue: Security rules file not found: firestore.rules
Security rules file not found: storage.rules

findings.title: Outdated/Vulnerable Dependencies in pubspec.yaml
findings.expected: All dependencies at or above minimum safe versions
findings.actual: All checked packages are at safe versions

remediation.details: Created .env.example template; Added to .gitignore: .env, *.env, .env.local, .env.production; Created SECRET_ROTATION_REQUIRED.md with rotation instructions
remediation.manual_action: Firebase API keys found in lib/firebase_options.dart. Rotate keys in Firebase Console. See automated_test/SECRET_ROTATION_REQUIRED.md

remediation.details: Added 7 security header(s): X-Frame-Options, X-Content-Type-Options, X-XSS-Protection, Referrer-Policy, Permissions-Policy, Content-Security-Policy, Strict-Transport-Security
Ensure every Firestore write checks FirebaseAuth.instance.currentUser != null before executing. Also enforce server-side rules in Firestore security rules.
Install Flutter/Dart SDK and ensure it is in PATH.
Replace `allow read, write: if true` with proper auth checks: `allow read, write: if request.auth != null && request.auth.uid == resource.data.uid`
